inputs.prompt: Media inquiry: Journalists asking about reports of a data breach at Clearwater Analytics affecting local government financial data. What is confirmed: The IT team has identified unauthorised access to one server. No evidence yet that data was extracted. The company has notified the ICO. Full statement expected by 6pm today. Organisation: Clearwater Analytics.

Media inquiry: A former employee has made allegations of workplace bullying on social media. Organisation: Greenleaf Design Studio. Cannot confirm or deny specifics. HR investigation underway. Full response by end of tomorrow.

Media inquiry: Journalists asking about allegations that a Nordic Health Initiative research partner in Latvia falsified patient data in a clinical trial. What is confirmed: NHI has been made aware of the allegations. The research partner has been suspended from the programme pending review. The relevant national ethics board has been notified. Full statement expected within 48 hours. Organisation: Nordic Health Initiative. Spokesperson: Dr. Ingrid Nørgaard.

Media inquiry: Multiple news outlets reporting an explosion at the company's chemical processing facility. Emergency services are on scene. What is confirmed: An incident occurred at approximately 14:30 at the Riverside facility. Emergency services were called immediately. The site has been evacuated. Two employees have been taken to hospital — condition unknown. What is NOT confirmed: Cause of the incident. Whether any hazardous materials were released. The number of people on site at the time. Organisation: Meridian Chemical Corp. Spokesperson: Head of Operations (CEO is travelling, unreachable for 2 hours). Full statement expected: Within 3 hours. Note: Social media videos of the explosion are already circulating. Local residents are posting about a chemical smell.

Media inquiry: A journalist has obtained an internal memo showing that the company knew about a product defect 6 months before issuing a recall. The memo is genuine. What is confirmed: The company issued a voluntary recall on [date]. The recalled products have been removed from shelves. What is NOT confirmed: Cannot comment on internal documents. Cannot confirm or deny the memo's authenticity without legal review. Organisation: SafeHome Electronics. Spokesperson: General Counsel's office. Full statement expected: 24 hours (legal review needed). Note: The journalist has given a 4-hour deadline before publishing with or without a comment.

Media inquiry: Reports that a humanitarian aid shipment was seized by a militia group at the border. What is confirmed: A convoy of 12 trucks carrying medical supplies and food was delayed at a checkpoint. Contact with the convoy drivers has been re-established. No staff were harmed. What is NOT confirmed: Who detained the convoy. Whether supplies were taken. Current status of the cargo. Organisation: Relief International (fictional NGO). Spokesperson: Country Director. Full statement expected: When the situation stabilises. Note: Staff safety is the absolute priority — the statement must not escalate the situation or identify specific armed groups.
